https://medium.com/@pedrodacruzmachado/n.title: Negative Space and Game Design. Some thoughts on how game designers can… | by Pedro Machado | Medium

highlights.highlight: Actively thinking about the Negative Space in your game and properly “designing it” is crucial. We spend a lot of time thinking about what players do, but sometimes what they don’t do is even more important.

https://siegarettes.medium.com/the-art-o.title: The Art of Nothing: A Look at Negative Space within Videogames | by amr al-aaser | Medium

highlights.highlight: One of the most important, though perhaps less considered, aspects of art is negative space. In traditional fine art spaces this refers to any space not taken up by the focal point or main subject of an image.
